articles.title: CLAUDE WEB SEARCH
articles.summary: Anthropic has enabled a new feature that allows Claude to search the web as part of its chat offering.

articles.title: OPENAI NEXT-GEN AUDIO MODELS
articles.summary: OpenAI has introduced new speech-to-text and text-to-speech models in its API, improving transcription accuracy and enabling customizable voice outputs for more natural and expressive speech agents.

articles.title: HUGGING FACE OPEN R1 GUIDE
articles.summary: A guide to setting up and using the OlympicCoder 7B model locally in VS Code with LM Studio for optimal coding assistance, including quantized inference for efficiency.

articles.title: DEEPMESH: AUTO-REGRESSIVE ARTIST-MESH CREATION WITH REINFORCEMENT LEARNING
articles.summary: Autoregressive creation of meshes from point clouds that are artist friendly and well topologized. It uses deep reinforcement learning to improve the quality of the meshes with some clever regularization rewards.

articles.title: END-TO-END 3D SEGMENTATION
articles.summary: A new object-aware lifting approach for 3D segmentation using Gaussian representations and a learnable object-level codebook.

articles.title: COMPRESSION FOR 3D GAUSSIAN SPLATTING
articles.summary: HAC++ achieves over 100X size reduction compared to 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) while enhancing fidelity, using advanced quantization and adaptive masking for superior compression in view synthesis tasks.

articles.title: ROBLOX FOUNDATION MODEL
articles.summary: Roblox has released a novel 3D generation and understanding foundation model that can be used for research applications.

articles.title: EFFICIENT VIDEO TRAINING WITH TOKEN OPTIMIZATION
articles.summary: FluxViT introduces a novel augmentation tool, Flux, to optimize video token selection, improving accuracy while significantly reducing computational cost in large-scale video pre-training.

articles.title: STATE SPACE MODELS FOR 3D OBJECT DETECTION
articles.summary: DEST3D applies an interactive state-space model for 3D object detection in point clouds, leveraging novel bidirectional scanning and inter-state attention mechanisms for efficient scene understanding.

articles.title: SYNCHRON'S BRAIN-COMPUTER INTERFACE NOW HAS NVIDIA'S AI
articles.summary: Neurotech company Synchron's Nvidia-powered brain-computer interface enables individuals with paralysis to control their home environment using the Apple Vision Pro headset. Synchron's BCI implants translate brain activity into commands, with improved speed and accuracy through Nvidia's Holoscan platform. By developing a cognitive AI based on brain data, Synchron aims for a scalable BCI system that offers more autonomous control for users with minimal training.

articles.title: WHAT DOES OPENAI REALLY WANT FROM TRUMP?
articles.summary: OpenAI's proposal to the White House seeks to bypass state AI laws like California's SB 1047 by leveraging federal trade laws against China and requesting significant AI infrastructure investments. With nearly 900 state AI bills under consideration, OpenAI argues that diverse state regulations could cause chaos, while a lack of federal framework leaves the industry vulnerable. Critics point out the absence of a national governance model in OpenAI's plan, which relies heavily on national security concerns to advance its agenda.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC SUPPORTS AI TRANSPARENCY IN POLICY DISCUSSIONS
articles.summary: Anthropic has responded to Governor Newsom's AI Working Group report, advocating for increased transparency in AI development and security practices. The company highlighted the need for standardized disclosure of safety measures to build public trust without stifling innovation.

articles.title: DAPR'S MICROSERVICES RUNTIME NOW SUPPORTS AI AGENTS
articles.summary: Microsoft's Dapr Agents are optimized for building scalable AI agents with efficient orchestration and statefulness.

articles.title: AI SLOP IS A BRUTE FORCE ATTACK ON THE ALGORITHMS THAT CONTROL REALITY
articles.summary: AI-generated content is flooding social media with spam-like brute force tactics, targeting algorithms rather than human engagement.

articles.title: CHINA WILL ENFORCE CLEAR FLAGGING OF ALL AI GENERATED CONTENT STARTING FROM SEPTEMBER
articles.summary: China will mandate explicit labeling of all AI-generated content by September, with the rules covering all data types including text, images, and videos.
